description: Letter addressed to Sar Shalom, written by a man whose wife and son had been in captivity by Edom (Christians) and who had lost all his property and had no profession, asking for bread and clothing. Possibly dated 1219. (Information from Mediterranean Society, V, p. 595, and from Goitein's index cards}
description_he: מכתב לשר שלום, שנכתב על ידי אדם שאשתו ובנו נלקחו בשבי על ידי נוצרים, ואיבד כל רכושו. מבקש לחם ובגד. אולי מתוארך 1219.
